definitions: An acronym for 'Team-Based Learning', a structured form of collaborative learning used in education.
An acronym for 'Triple Bottom Line', a framework for businesses to measure their success in terms of social, environmental, and economic performance.
examples: The university implemented TBL across several courses.
Many companies are now adopting a TBL approach to sustainability.
Students found the TBL methodology engaging.
Reporting on the TBL is becoming standard practice.
